title: ASUS RT-BE58U BE3600 WiFi 7 AiMesh Extendable Router, 4K QAM, MLO, AI Detection 2.5G WAN/LAN port , Four 1G ports, Commercial Grade Network Security, Parental Control, IoT network, VPN network
features: Dual-band WiFi 7 speeds up to 3600 Mbps with MLO and 4K-QAM
AI-powered Smart AiMesh boosts coverage up to 2700 ft2 and easy extendibility with compatible ASUS routers for seamless and secure whole home WiFi
Sustainable design with up to 30% PCR plastic and FSC certified package
Four internal antennas and four high-power front-end modules eliminate WiFi dead zones
24/7 End-to-end protection with commercial-grade AiProtection Pro and advanced VPNs
Establish up to three SSIDs for parental controls and IoT devices with Smart Home Master Network
Multi-WAN with a 2.5G WAN/LAN Ethernet port and auto detection
4G LTE/5G Mobile Tethering for always-on internet
description: From the manufacturer Elevate your smart home with blazing-fast dual-band WiFi 7 speeds of up to 3600 Mbps and boosted coverage with next-gen AiMeshtechnology. With enhanced ASUS Network Security and a suite of advanced network technologies such as IoT Network, the RT-BE58U safeguard your network end-to-end, 24/7. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  0:00 Loaded : 0% Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 0:00   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions captions off , selected Audio Track Fullscreen This is a modal window. Faster, Smarter Home WiFi 7 The RT-BE58U boasts dual-band WiFi 7 technology, achieving blazing-fast speeds of 3600 Mbps, ensuring seamless streaming, gaming, and data-intensive tasks. Whether you’re binge-watching your favorite shows or collaborating in a virtual meeting, this router delivers. Sustaining an Incredible Future ASUS is committed to sustainability via durable product design and eco-packaging. Up to 30% of PCR Plastic Certified FSC Mix Packaging Award-winning Reliability WiFi 7 Powering AiMesh RT-BE58U utilizes the power of WiFi 7 MLO into next-gen AiMesh technology, delivering wider coverage, a more stable and secure network and a feature-rich network experience – all under one network name for your entire smart home. Multi-gig Home Network The RT-BE58U includes one 2.5G WAN/LAN port for high-speed entertainment, home offices, or ultrafast ethernet backhaul. It also provides versatile WANs, including a 2.5G WAN/LAN port, a 1G WAN/LAN port, and a USB WAN for flexible network configurations. etwork Security Triple-Level Protection ASUS Network Security deploys a triple-level protection design and commercial-grade cloud database powered by Trend Micro, safeguarding your network from end-to-end and 24/7. This powerful and advanced security ensures a network protected against ever evolving cyber threats. Smart Home Master Subnet ASUS Smart Home Master simplifies subnetwork management, making it easy to create or connect to dedicated SSIDs with advanced features like VPNs. Kid’s Network Create a dedicated SSID just for the kids to easily manage their screen time without needing to configure each device individually. IoT Network Set up and manage all your IoT devices under one secure SSID to provide enhanced security with commercial-grade protection. VPN Network Connect to your preferred VPN service through a dedicated subnetwork, with a single click. Safer, Smarter Family Protection Advanced family protection and parental controls empower you to cultivate a balanced digital life for you and your kids, all without subscriptions. Router Protection and Management Made Easy ASUS Network Security includes convenient network tools such as a one-tap Security Scan for diagnosing network health, fine-tuned settings options, and on-the-go notifications. The intuitive interface of the ASUS Router mobile app makes managing your network simple on your smartphone.
